meta.title: Ram Kumar Gogu | Portfolio
meta.description: Ram Kumar Gogu: DevOps-focused Software Engineer. Experience across Kubernetes/OpenShift, CI/CD, and AWS/Azure.

hero.name: Ram Kumar Gogu
hero.tagline: Senior DevOps-focused software engineer with 10+ years in automation, CI/CD, and cloud platforms (Azure/AWS).

highlights.title: Platform & Automation
highlights.body: CI/CD, infrastructure as code, and repeatable delivery across environments.

highlights.title: Containers & Cloud
highlights.body: Docker, Kubernetes/OpenShift, and cloud-native architectures on AWS/Azure.

highlights.title: Reliable Systems
highlights.body: Security, observability, and operational simplicity built into the workflow.

experience.title: Sr. DevOps Engineer
details: Implemented and optimized Docker, Kubernetes, and OpenShift environments for scalable and resilient deployments.
Integrated GEN-AI model workloads and API gateway tooling (including APIGEE / enterprise gateway integration).
Automated infrastructure and deployments with Terraform and config-management tools; improved security with secrets management and scanning.

experience.title: Sr. DevOps Engineer
details: Architected and deployed highly available AWS solutions (EC2, ELB, Auto Scaling, S3).
Built CI/CD pipelines for .NET and Python, integrating GitHub/VSTS and artifacts; shipped serverless services with Lambda/SNS/SQS.
Implemented monitoring/logging and performance tracking across CDN/DNS and traffic patterns.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
details: Developed and maintained Python automation scripts to improve operational efficiency.
Worked across Linux environments and supported Terraform-based provisioning for cloud infrastructure.
Built familiarity with GCP services (Compute Engine, Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Dataproc) and cloud operations workflows.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
details: Supported CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins and collaborated with teams using GitHub-based workflows.
Assisted with containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) and basic administration of PostgreSQL/MongoDB.
Contributed to Java/J2EE applications using Spring and Hibernate; assisted with configuration management (Ansible, Chef).

experience.title: Jr. DevOps Engineer
details: Automated Linux routines with Bash and supported WebLogic operations and troubleshooting.
Provisioned AWS infrastructure using CloudFormation and Terraform across VPC/compute/storage/DB/monitoring services.
Supported cloud migrations to Azure (Azure Migrate / Site Recovery) and customized build processes using PowerShell.

education.field: Computer and Information Systems Security / Information Assurance

footerNote: Built as a static site. Edit content.json to customize.
